headline: Strength Seen in PulteGroup (PHM): Can Its 4.2% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: PulteGroup (PHM) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
